zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Burley V於1392年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft22歲，母親Mrs. John Burley21歲。他於1425年與Lady Alice de Grey在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Broncroft Castle, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴

zh-hans.Wokingham, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏沃吉加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Burley V于1392年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft22岁，母亲Mrs. John Burley21岁。他于1425年与Lady Alice de Grey在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Burley V was born in 1392, in Shropshire, England, his father, Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft, was 22 and his mother, Mrs. John Burley, was 21. He married Lady Alice de Grey in 1425, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Burley V est né en 1392, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Burley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Grey en 1425, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Burley V 1392 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft 22 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Burley 21. Er hat 1425 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Burley V è nato il nel 1392 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Burley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Grey nel 1425, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Burley Vが1392年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroftは22歳，母Mrs. John Burleyは21歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチでLady Alice de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Burley V(이)가 1392년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Burley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 Lady Alice de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Burley V nasceu em 1392, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Burley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Grey em 1425, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Burley V родился в 1392 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Burley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Grey в 1425 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Burley V nació en 1392, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Burley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Grey en 1425, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas.
